case_title: JOHNNY SMITH VS. SAFEWAY, INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, JOHNNY AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-03-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-02-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-11-2020
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-03-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-15-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ARBITRATOR KEVIN JAIME GRAY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-05-2021 THROUGH APR-05-2021.
